Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Serpent's Grave]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Serpent's Grave is a destination the group will arrive at in less than ten hours.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location Eithan and Cassias are heading towards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Serpent's Grave was one of the first outposts of the Arelius family on this continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Serpent’s Grave is a city of dragon's bone located in a desert.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of Black Flame was created in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Serpent's Grave is a location where there is no snow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Serpent's Grave is a city where Shiryu Mountain looms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Serpent’s Grave contains a refinery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Serpent’s Grave is a mound of bones in an ocean of yellow sand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location where shadows cast by the setting sun are long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Serpent’s Grave is located below Shiryu Mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Serpent’s Grave was bathed in white light from an explosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — Serpent's Grave is breaking into a war zone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 19''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location where Stellar Spear madra is present.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Renfei and her partner patrolled near Serpent’s Grave.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Serpent's Grave is a location containing a dragon's den.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Serpent's Grave is a location the Skysworn left before bringing Lindon to his current room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The original Ancestor’s Spear is locked away in Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Serpent's Grave is a location that Stormrock passes over.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 11''' — Orthos could have gone insane in Serpent's Grave.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location Lindon mentions.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Serpent’s Grave is a city that Jai Daishou once helped to attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — The caravan of cloudships traveled to Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Serpent’s Grave is a city built from ancient, giant dragon bones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Serpent's Grave is a location where Yerin stays.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Serpent’s Grave is located near the Twin Star Sect headquarters.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Wei Shi Seisha is in Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Serpent's Grave is where remnants of royal black dragons would be found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Serpent’s Grave is a long trip from Sacred Valley by cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Serpent’s Grave has streets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Serpent’s Grave has Highgolds and Truegolds defending it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location where Wei Shi Jaran lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Serpent's Grave is the territory of the Twin Star Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location where the Arelius family has a house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location from which Lindon cannot yet create a portal to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Lindon and Yerin worked together in Serpent’s Grave.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The people of Serpent’s Grave have heard about the Empty Ghost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Serpent's Grave is a location that the Grave might have been named after.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — Serpent’s Grave is a location where Jai Daishou fought.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
